case_title: KALPESHKUMAR GOHIL VS. NICOLAS BUNAND ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOHIL, KALPESHKUMAR DBA ADMIRAL HOTEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUNAND, NICOLAS PETTIT, JESSICA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 608 O'FARRELL STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109 - UNIT 62 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BUNAND, NICOLAS PETTIT, JESSICA

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOHIL, KALPESHKUMAR DBA ADMIRAL HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT BUNAND, NICOLAS PETTIT, JESSICA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
